text: The atmosphere here is surreal and a bit sterile. I feel like an observer on the edge of innovation—or perhaps an outsider peering into a world structured for efficiency and progress. The glass and neon invite reflection, yet there's a coldness to the engineered order. Here, in this place of R+D, I wonder if true creativity can flourish within such precision, or if the boundaries confine what might otherwise bloom. I feel small, thoughtful, almost weightless—my presence both significant as witness and insignificant amid this high-tech abstraction.
